title: Project State
description: Schema for state/project-state.json — the machine-readable state file tracking project progress.

project_id.description: Must match the project_id in project.yaml.

active_round.description: Currently active round number, or null if no active round.

total_rounds.description: Total number of rounds executed (including completed).

evidence_saturation.description: Proportion of core claims with A-level or better evidence and no unresolved fatal/high critiques. Range 0.0 to 1.0.

open_gaps.description: Number of currently open research gaps.

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last state update.
